title: La mort du cygne
writer: Paul Morand, Jean Benoît-Lévy, Marie Epstein
actors: Yvette Chauviré, Mia Slavenska, Janine Charrat
plot: As the title would suggest, La Mort du Cygne (The Death of the Swan) is set in the high art world of ballet. In fact, it is the first full length motion picture set in this world. It is about a young dance student, Rose Souris, wh...
